criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration and features offered.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of productivity features offered.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other apps and services.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, integration platforms like Zapier

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store update history, official blog posts
